articles.author: Reuters Staff
articles.title: Oil prices rise as OPEC+ cuts take effect
articles.description: Crude oil prices climbed on Monday as OPEC+ production cuts began to take effect.
articles.content: Crude oil prices climbed on Monday as OPEC+ production cuts began to take effect, with Brent crude futures rising 1.2% to $78.50 a barrel...

articles.author: John Doe
articles.title: LNG exports surge amid rising demand in Asia
articles.description: Liquefied natural gas exports from the US reached record levels in June.
articles.content: Liquefied natural gas exports from the United States reached record levels in June as demand from Asian buyers continued to grow...
